'''layono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilcan|oilcan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-y-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilcan|oilcan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| layono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læyeneth|læyeneth]] || [[word:læyenej|læyenej]] || [[word:læyenesh|læyenesh]] || [[word:læyene|læyene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:layoyonoth|layoyonoth]] || [[word:layoyonoj|layoyonoj]] || [[word:layoyonosh|layoyonosh]] || [[word:layoyono|layoyono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:layonoth|layonoth]] || [[word:layonoj|layonoj]] || [[word:layonosh|layonosh]] || [[word:layono|layono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:layofnoth|layofnoth]] || [[word:layofnoj|layofnoj]] || [[word:layofnosh|layofnosh]] || [[word:layofnof|layofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:layonotho|layonotho]] || [[word:layonojo|layonojo]] || [[word:layonosho|layonosho]] || [[word:layonoko|layonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:layonoth|layonoth]] || [[word:layonoj|layonoj]] || [[word:layonosh|layonosh]] || [[word:layono|layono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:layonothol|layonothol]] || [[word:layonojol|layonojol]] || [[word:layonoshol|layonoshol]] || [[word:layonokol|layonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:layonothotho|layonothotho]] || [[word:layonojojo|layonojojo]] || [[word:layonoshosho|layonoshosho]] || [[word:layonoko|layonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:layonothon|layonothon]] || [[word:layonojon|layonojon]] || [[word:layonoshon|layonoshon]] || [[word:layonokon|layonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:layonothoro|layonothoro]] || [[word:layonojoro|layonojoro]] || [[word:layonoshoro|layonoshoro]] || [[word:layonokoro|layonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
